title: Cosmetic Unlock System
summary: Add a cosmetic unlock system where players earn visual customizations through gameplay progress. Wire colors, gate skins, and board themes unlock via star thresholds and chapter completions. A new Customization section on the level select screen lets players preview and select cosmetics. All selections persist in localStorage.

tasks.description: Create CosmeticManager class with categories: wireColors, gateSkins, boardThemes. Each cosmetic has an id, name, unlock condition (stars threshold or achievement), preview description, and locked/unlocked state. Load/save to localStorage.
acceptance_criteria: CosmeticManager class exists with wireColors, gateSkins, boardThemes arrays
Each cosmetic has: id, name, description, unlockCondition, isUnlocked() method
Selections persist in localStorage under 'signal-circuit-cosmetics' key
getActiveWireColor(), getActiveGateSkin(), getActiveBoardTheme() methods return current selections

tasks.description: Define wire color cosmetics: default green (free), blue (10 stars), orange (25 stars), purple (50 stars), rainbow (all 3-star), gold (perfect campaign — 3-star all levels). Wire colors change the WIRE_COLORS_DEFAULT palette used in wires.js.
acceptance_criteria: 6 wire color options defined with star/achievement unlock conditions
checkUnlocks() method evaluates conditions against current progress
Default wire color is 'classic' (existing green-based palette)

tasks.description: Define gate skin cosmetics: default IC chip (free), neon (Chapter 2 complete), retro (Chapter 4 complete), minimal (50% 3-star). Gate skins change the rendering style in Gate.render().
acceptance_criteria: 4 gate skin options defined with chapter/star unlock conditions
Each skin has a distinct visual style description

tasks.description: Define board theme cosmetics: default breadboard (free), PCB green (Chapter 3 complete), dark circuit (Chapter 5 complete), blueprint (all chapters complete). Board themes change drawBreadboard() in canvas.js.
acceptance_criteria: 4 board theme options defined with chapter completion unlock conditions
Each theme has a distinct visual description

tasks.description: Add Customization button and modal to level select screen. Show three sections (Wire Colors, Gate Skins, Board Themes) with preview thumbnails. Locked cosmetics show lock icon + unlock condition. Selected cosmetic has green checkmark.
acceptance_criteria: 🎨 Customize button visible on level select screen
Modal shows all cosmetics grouped by category
Locked cosmetics show lock icon and condition text
Selected cosmetic highlighted with checkmark
Click on unlocked cosmetic selects it

tasks.description: Wire rendering respects active wire color cosmetic. Modify wires.js to check CosmeticManager for active wire palette and use it instead of hardcoded WIRE_COLORS_DEFAULT.
acceptance_criteria: Selecting blue wire color makes all new wires use blue-based palette
Rainbow mode cycles through full rainbow hues
Gold mode uses gold/amber shades
Existing wires update when palette changes (on next level load)

tasks.description: Gate rendering respects active gate skin cosmetic. Add alternate render paths in Gate.render() for neon, retro, and minimal skins.
acceptance_criteria: Neon skin: bright colored outlines, dark fill, glowing text
Retro skin: rounded corners, softer colors, serif labels
Minimal skin: flat white rectangles, no shadow, thin borders
Default IC chip skin remains unchanged

tasks.description: Board rendering respects active board theme cosmetic. Add alternate drawBreadboard() styles in canvas.js for PCB green, dark circuit, and blueprint themes.
acceptance_criteria: PCB green: dark green background, white silkscreen traces, silver pads
Dark circuit: near-black background, faint cyan traces, minimal grid
Blueprint: white background, blue grid lines, blue-on-white aesthetic
Default breadboard theme remains unchanged

tasks.description: Show NEW UNLOCK! toast when a cosmetic is earned after level completion. Check unlocks on every level complete and show toast if new cosmetics are available.
acceptance_criteria: After level completion, checkUnlocks() is called
If new cosmetics were unlocked, toast shows '🎨 New cosmetic unlocked: {name}'
Toast appears after the star display animation

tasks.description: Wire Customization UI and rendering integration. Connect CosmeticManager to UI event handlers and ensure game.cosmetics is accessible from wires.js, gates.js, and canvas.js rendering paths.
acceptance_criteria: game.cosmetics is initialized in GameState constructor
UI modal renders dynamically from CosmeticManager data
Selecting a cosmetic immediately updates game state and marks dirty
Cosmetic selections survive page reload

testing_focus: Verify wire colors change when cosmetic is selected
Verify gate skins render correctly for each option
Verify board themes render correctly for each option
Verify unlock conditions are correctly evaluated
Verify cosmetic selections persist across page reload
Verify NEW UNLOCK toast shows after earning a cosmetic
Verify light mode and colorblind mode still work with custom cosmetics
Verify mobile layout of customization modal
rollback_criteria: If any P0 bug is introduced, revert to previous commit
